hero.title: Your body is recovering right now.
hero.subtitle: Soma shows you how — organ by organ, receptor by receptor, backed by real science.
hero.login: Already have an account? Sign in

what.title: Not another wellness app.
what.p1: Soma is a gamified body recovery tracker for people in substance abstinence. It maps the real physiological changes happening inside you — from liver enzyme normalization to dopamine receptor repopulation — and turns them into visible, measurable progress.
what.p2: No motivational quotes. No day counters. Your actual body, recovering in real time, based on published medical literature.
what.p3: When we don't know something for certain, we tell you. Every data point carries a confidence level. Honesty about uncertainty — not fake precision.

how.title: Three steps. No guesswork.
how.step1_desc: Mark your substances, usage history, and when you stopped. Soma builds your personal recovery model.
how.step2_desc: A 3D anatomical model shows each organ's recovery state in real time. Liver, lungs, heart, brain regions — all mapped to your timeline.
how.step3_desc: 77 achievements tied to actual physiological milestones. Not 'Day 30 badge' — 'Your D2 receptors have repopulated the striatum.'

science.title: Built on data, not hope.
science.p1: Recovery curves for each substance × organ pair are modeled from peer-reviewed literature. Logarithmic, sigmoidal, or exponential — whichever matches the actual physiology.
science.p2: Every piece of medical data in Soma carries a confidence level: high, medium, or low. When the evidence is strong, we say so. When it's approximate, we say that too.
science.p3: Five substances modeled so far — alcohol, nicotine, cannabis, cocaine, caffeine — across multiple organ systems and neurotransmitter pathways. More coming.

trophies.title: Every milestone your body crosses, recognized.
trophies.p1: 77 trophies across five substances. Bronze for the first days. Silver for the weeks. Gold for the months. Platinum for full sovereignty over your biology.
trophies.example1_desc: Survive the acute withdrawal phase — the most physiologically dangerous of any substance.
trophies.example2_desc: Dopamine receptor density approaches baseline. Natural rewards feel meaningful again.
trophies.example3_desc: Absolute neurochemical freedom. The reward circuit is fully restored.
trophies.hidden_note: Some trophies are hidden. You'll discover them when your body does.

footer.tagline: Your body is already doing the work. Soma lets you see it.
